overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a dimly lit industrial underground facility with neon cyan and purple lighting. The player character navigates through storage rooms and corridors, approaching an NPC with extensive tattoos and cybernetic implants near computer workstations.

events.description: opening metal security door with wire mesh window

metal security door with wire mesh window panel

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit narrow storage room with metal shelving units lining the walls. The player moves forward through the confined concrete space toward a metal security door, which is opened to transition to the next area.

segments.scene_description: The player exits the storage room into a larger industrial workspace illuminated by cyan neon lights. Metal lockers line the right wall while a tattooed NPC with cybernetic implants stands near wooden crates in the center. The player approaches the NPC and the desk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: computer workstation area with wall-mounted monitors

turning away from computer setup to exit the room

segments.scene_description: The player moves closer to the workstation, examining the computer screens and desk equipment. The tattooed NPC remains standing nearby. The area features metal file cabinets and a colorful wall poster. After inspecting the setup, the player turns to exit the room.

events.description: exiting workspace through door into narrow concrete corridor
lighting shifts from cyan to purple tone in the corridor

entered.detail: vertical purple neon light fixtures mounted on concrete walls
large rolling metal tool chest with multiple drawers
concrete wall with spray paint graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The player exits the workspace into a narrow concrete corridor illuminated by purple emergency lights. A large metal tool cabinet sits in the center of the corridor, and the walls feature graffiti markings. The lighting shifts from the previous cyan tones to a distinct purple ambiance as the player moves forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped storage area through a neon-lit industrial workspace and into a moody concrete corridor. It begins in a dimly lit, narrow storage room with metal shelving, moving forward through the confined concrete space toward a security door. As the door opens, the scene expands into a larger workspace illuminated by cyan neon lights, where the camera approaches a tattooed NPC with cybernetic implants standing near wooden crates and a computer workstation. The view then lingers on the desk equipment and colorful wall posters before turning away to exit the room. Finally, the environment shifts from cyan to a distinct purple ambiance as the camera enters a narrow concrete corridor featuring graffiti-covered walls and a large metal tool cabinet.
